processes.name: DocAction_Process
processes.description: Process/Complete the RMA document. On completion, generates return shipment and optionally a vendor credit memo

steps.name: validateLines
steps.description: Ensure at least one RMA line exists

steps.name: validateQuantities
steps.description: Ensure all line quantities are valid and do not exceed original receipt

edgeCases.name: excessQuantity
edgeCases.trigger: Return quantity exceeds original receipt qty
